title: alyssum campestre var. hirsutum
intro: Alyssum campestre var. hirsutum is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as a hairy or rough alyssum. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Alyssum campestre var. hirsutum include infusions, teas, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
